descriptions: KNLA is the armed wing of the KNU.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2006, the Tatmadaw launched a large-scale military offensive against the KNU's armed wing, the Karen National Liberation Army (KNLA).

descriptions: KNLA is the armed wing of KNU.
edges.evidence_quote: the Karen National Union (KNU) and its armed wing the Karen National Liberation Army (KNLA)

descriptions: MNLA had minor skirmishes with KNLA.
edges.evidence_quote: It signed the Nationwide Ceasefire Agreement in 2015 and has had minor skirmishes with the Karen National Liberation Army (KNLA).

Hutch Organised Crime Gang.description: Irish criminal organization based in Dublin, founded in the 1980s by Gerry Hutch. Involved in drug trafficking, armed robberies, and murders, with operations in Ireland, Spain, and the UK. Known for a violent feud with the Kinahan Organised Crime Group. Assets estimated up to €20 million.

descriptions: The Hutch gang is allied with the Keane-Collopy Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Keane-Collopy Gang , McCarthy-Dundon Gang , RIRA , New IRA

descriptions: The Hutch gang is in a feud with the Kinahan Organised Crime Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Kinahan Organised Crime Group

descriptions: The Hutch gang is allied with the McCarthy-Dundon Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Keane-Collopy Gang , McCarthy-Dundon Gang , RIRA , New IRA

descriptions: The Hutch gang is allied with the New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Keane-Collopy Gang , McCarthy-Dundon Gang , RIRA , New IRA

descriptions: The Hutch gang is allied with the Real Irish Republican Army.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Keane-Collopy Gang , McCarthy-Dundon Gang , RIRA , New IRA

descriptions: Keane-Collopy gang is allied with the Hutch Organised Crime Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hutch Organised Crime Gang

descriptions: The Kinahan Cartel and Hutch Gang have been in a violent feud since 2015, resulting in multiple deaths.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kinahan Cartel has had an ongoing feud with the Hutch Gang since 2015, which had resulted in 18 deaths by August 2021.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Hutch Organised Crime Gang as an ally of the McCarthy-Dundon Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hutch Organised Crime Gang, Ryan Gang

descriptions: Native Mob is a rival of Project Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Native Gangster Disciples , Folk Nation , Gangster Disciples , Native Disciples , Project Boyz , Moe Mob

descriptions: Cleveland family fought a violent war with Danny Greene's gang over control of rackets.
edges.evidence_quote: a violent mob war between the Cleveland family and Greene's gang

descriptions: La Barra Del Rojo has had fights with La Guardia Imperial, the barra brava of Racing de Avellaneda.
edges.evidence_quote: During its existence, the barra brava has had several fights and altercations with the Argentine police and with other barras bravas, especially with that of Racing de Avellaneda ( La Guardia Imperial ), Independiente's main football rival;

descriptions: Head Hunters absorbed Satan's Slaves MC by patching over in 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: the Satan's Slaves MC in 2014

descriptions: Hells Angels were in a turf war with Satans Slaves.
edges.evidence_quote: The Nomads chapter became involved in a turf war with the Southampton chapter of the Satans Slaves, which began after Hells Angels members Stephen Harris and Barry Burn were fired upon during a trip to Bristol.

descriptions: Lone Legion is a member of the A-Team alliance with Satan's Slaves MC.
edges.evidence_quote: According to media and Police the club is a member of the "A-Team", an alliance between several NZ biker groups including the Outcasts MC, the Epitaph Riders MC, the Forty-Fives MC, the Southern Vikings MC, Satan's Slaves MC, Sinn Fein MC and the Lost Breed MC .

descriptions: London Field Boys listed as a rival of Tottenham Mandem in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Northumberland Park Killers (NPK), Hackney Boys, London Field Boys (LFB)

Amato-Pagano clan.description: The Amato-Pagano clan, also known as the Scissionisti di Secondigliano, is a Camorra clan from the Secondigliano district of Naples, founded in 2004 by Raffaele Amato and Cesare Pagano. It split from the Di Lauro clan and engaged in a violent feud known as the Scampia feud, resulting in over 100 murders. The clan is heavily involved in international drug trafficking, particularly cocaine, with a strong presence in Spain. Currently, it is one of the most important Camorra organizations.

descriptions: 'Ndrangheta listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Abete clan was an ally of Scissionisti.
edges.evidence_quote: Abete clan (Scampia) - Boss: Arcangelo Abete

descriptions: Bizzarro clan listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bizzarro clan

descriptions: Abbinante clan became a former ally, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Former allies: Abbinante clan

descriptions: Abbinante clan was an ally of Scissionisti.
edges.evidence_quote: Abbinante clan (Marano) - Boss: Raffaele Abbinante ... they aligned with the scissionisti

descriptions: Scissionisti fought a war against Di Lauro clan.
edges.evidence_quote: After the end of the war against the Di Lauro clan

descriptions: Pariante clan became a former ally, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Former allies: Pariante clan

descriptions: Pariante clan was an ally of Scissionisti.
edges.evidence_quote: Pariante clan (Bacoli, Monte di Procida) - Boss: Rosario Pariante ... joined the scissionisti alliance in late 2004

descriptions: The Girati della Vanella Grassi were an internal faction of the Scissionisti that turned against them.
edges.evidence_quote: La nuova faida vedeva contrapposto il cartello degli Scissionisti ad una sua fazione interna, i cui componenti del clan sono stati ribattezzati Girati della Vanella Grassi

descriptions: Lepre clan listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Lepre clan

descriptions: Lo Russo clan listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Lo Russo clan (defunct)

descriptions: Marino clan later fought against Scissionisti.
edges.evidence_quote: Eventually, after the Scampia feud, the Marino clan went to war against the Scissionisti.

descriptions: Marino clan was initially allied as military wing, later went to war.
edges.evidence_quote: Marino clan (Case Celesti, Secondigliano) - Boss: Gennaro Marino ... Head of the military wing of the Scissionisti. Eventually, after the Scampia feud, the Marino clan went to war against the Scissionisti.

descriptions: Notturno clan became a former ally, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Former allies: Notturno clan

descriptions: Notturno clan was an ally of Scissionisti.
edges.evidence_quote: Notturno clan (Scampia) - Boss: Raffaele Notturno and Gennaro Notturno ... aligned with the scissionisti

descriptions: Ruocco clan listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Ruocco clan

descriptions: Russo clan (QS) listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Russo clan (from the QS)

descriptions: Vanella Grassi listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Vanella Grassi (girati)

descriptions: The Scissionisti di Secondigliano is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Scissionisti di Secondigliano is a Camorra clan in contact with Albanian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalla seconda relazione semestrale del 2010 della DIA vengono illustrati contatti tra la mafia albanese e il clan Mazzarella, con gli Scissionisti di Secondigliano e il clan Serino di Sarno.

descriptions: Francesco Abbinante sided with the Scissionisti, a splinter group.
edges.evidence_quote: prima di schierarsi con gli Scissionisti

descriptions: Scissionisti di Secondigliano rebelled and waged war against Clan Di Lauro.
edges.evidence_quote: alcuni fedelissimi di Paolo Di Lauro abbandonarono il boss, si ribellarono e gli fecero la guerra in qualità di Scissionisti di Secondigliano

descriptions: The Scissionisti di Secondigliano split from the Di Lauro clan, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: il conflitto si scatenò quando vari gruppi scissionisti del clan Di Lauro decisero di staccarsi dalla casa madre

descriptions: The Di Lauro clan and Scissionisti di Secondigliano fought a bloody feud in 2004-2005.
edges.evidence_quote: the Di Lauro clan and the so-called Scissionisti di Secondigliano fought a bloody feud which came to be known ... as the Scampia feud

descriptions: The Di Lauro clan was at war with the Scissionisti di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: the Scissionistis with whom the Di Lauro clan was at war

descriptions: Scissionisti di Secondigliano formed from former Di Lauro allies and fought a power struggle.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of Di Lauro's former allies formed a rival alliance (Scissionisti di Secondigliano) and started a bloody power struggle in 2004 known as the Scampia feud.

descriptions: Di Lauro clan fought a war against the Scissionisti di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: The Di Lauro clan war against the Scissionisti di Secondigliano inspired the current Italian television series Gomorrah.

descriptions: The two groups were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: la prima faida di Scampia che vede contrapposti il clan Di Lauro contro quello degli Scissionisti

descriptions: Scissionisti are a splinter group from the Di Lauro clan.
edges.evidence_quote: prima di schierarsi con gli Scissionisti

descriptions: Clan Licciardi mediated between Di Lauro and Scissionisti to end the Scampia feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan che ha sfruttato la sua influenza per mediare tra i gruppi Di Lauro e Scissionisti per mettere fine alla faida di Scampia

descriptions: Clan Sarno had a significant alliance with the Amato-Pagano clan.
edges.evidence_quote: tessere una tela molto importante con gli Amato-Pagano

descriptions: Ferone clan switched sides to join the Scissionisti.
edges.evidence_quote: dopo tale episodio il clan Ferone passerà nelle file degli Scissionisti

descriptions: Lo Russo clan acted as intermediary between Di Lauro clan and secessionists.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Scampia feud, the Lo Russo clan had a role as an intermediary between the Di Lauro clan and the so-called 'secessionists'

descriptions: Carlo Gambino formed an alliance with the Di Maggio clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Carlo Gambino created an alliance between the Gambino family and three Sicilian clans: the Inzerillos, the Spatolas and the Di Maggios.

D.C. Blacks.description: The D.C. Blacks is an African-American prison gang in the United States whose members are from Washington D.C. They are allied with the Black Guerrilla Family and rival the Aryan Brotherhood. Formed due to the concentration of D.C. inmates in federal facilities, they are one of the largest prison gangs within penitentiaries but smaller than gangs like the Bloods and Crips.

descriptions: D.C. Blacks is a rival gang of Aryan Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: Other rival gangs include the Black P. Stones, Bloods, Crips, D.C. Blacks, and Nuestra Familia.

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood considers D.C. Blacks a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Otras bandas rivales incluyen ... D.C. Blacks

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood is a main rival of D.C. Blacks.
edges.evidence_quote: The Aryan Brotherhood is one of their main rivals.

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood and D.C. Blacks engaged in a race war with killings.
edges.evidence_quote: The race war in the federal system between the Aryan Brotherhood and the D.C. Blacks started on November 22, 1981, when a member of the Aryan Brotherhood, Thomas Silverstein, murdered a member of the D.C. Blacks, Robert M. Chappelle.

descriptions: D.C. Blacks are allied with Black Guerrilla Family.
edges.evidence_quote: They are allied with the Black Guerrilla Family and some other black prison gangs.

descriptions: Infobox lists D.C. Blacks as enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... D.C. Blacks

descriptions: MOD and ORB are rival gangs that formed from the breakup of Peace MOD.
edges.evidence_quote: the breakup of "Peace MOD" created rivalries between all three of them.

descriptions: PCC lists Primer Cartel Uruguayo as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Latin America : TCP , GDE , BDM , EPP , FARC , Tren de Aragua , Jalisco Cartel , Massa Carcerária [ pt ] , Primer Cartel Uruguayo.

descriptions: The Viet Cong supported the Khmer Rouge's military buildup.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kampuchea Revolutionary Army was slowly built up in the forests of eastern Cambodia during the late 1960s, supported by the ... Viet Cong

descriptions: The Viet Cong supported the Khmer Rouge's military buildup in the late 1960s.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kampuchea Revolutionary Army was slowly built up in the forests of eastern Cambodia during the late 1960s, supported by the ... Viet Cong

descriptions: The Viet Cong supported the Khmer Rouge in building its army.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kampuchea Revolutionary Army was slowly built up in the forests of eastern Cambodia during the late 1960s, supported by the People's Army of Vietnam, the Viet Cong

descriptions: The Verde clan fought with the Ranucci clan.
time_periods: between the end of the 1980s and the 1990s
edges.evidence_quote: the Verde clan fought with the Puca and Ranucci clans

descriptions: The United Nations lists the Duhre group as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Duhre group of British Columbia

Kinahan Organised Crime Group.description: Major Irish transnational organised crime syndicate founded by Christy Kinahan in the 1990s. Based in Dublin, it is one of the largest criminal groups globally, involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, and arms trafficking. Estimated wealth up to €1 billion. Engaged in a violent feud with the Hutch Gang since 2015.

descriptions: The Family has avoided open conflict with the Kinahan group and has occasionally acted as a distribution partner for international cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: While The Family has clashed with smaller regional gangs over territory, Garda sources suggest the group has occasionally acted as a domestic distribution partner for international cartels, avoiding open conflict with the Kinahans in recent years.

descriptions: Hellbanianz is a rival of the Kinahan Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Kinahan Cartel , A-team , Huyton Firm

descriptions: Hezbollah coordinated a cocaine shipment from Venezuela with the Kinahan Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Irish courts sentenced two Iranian nationals involved in the incident whom police determined to be affiliated with Hezbollah, which had organized the shipment from Venezuela in coordination with the Kinahan cartel

descriptions: The Hutch gang is in a feud with the Kinahan Organised Crime Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Kinahan Organised Crime Group

descriptions: The 'Ndrangheta is listed as an ally of the Kinahan Organised Crime Group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: The Camorra is listed as an ally of the Kinahan Organised Crime Group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Camorra

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels MC

descriptions: Kinahan cartel coordinated with Hezbollah in a failed cocaine smuggling attempt in September 2023.
edges.evidence_quote: Authorities believe that the Kinahan cartel coordinated with Hezbollah in a failed attempt to smuggle 2.2 tons of cocaine from Venezuela to Ireland in September 2023.

descriptions: The Kinahan Cartel and Hutch Gang have been in a violent feud since 2015, resulting in multiple deaths.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kinahan Cartel has had an ongoing feud with the Hutch Gang since 2015, which had resulted in 18 deaths by August 2021.

descriptions: The Tito and Dino Cartel is listed as an ally of the Kinahan Organised Crime Group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tito and Dino Cartel

descriptions: Steven Lyons, head of the Lyons Crime Family, has connections with the Kinahan Organized Crime Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Steven Lyons is also believed to have connections with the Dubai-based Kinahan Organized Crime Group .

descriptions: Kinahan cartel killed a New IRA member, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Gardaí suspected Barr was shot dead because it was believed by the Kinahan cartel that he had provided a 'safe house' to one of the gunmen in the Regency Hotel attack.

descriptions: Kinahan Organised Crime Group is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: international alliances are thought to include ... Kinahan Organised Crime Group

descriptions: The US cited close ties between the Tito and Dino Cartel and the Kinahan Organised Crime Group.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2023 Edin Gačanin was sanctioned by the US who cited "close ties" to the Irish Kinahan Organised Crime Group and a €350m cocaine plot.

descriptions: The Paranza dei Bambini was allied with the Brunetti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: affiancati dai clan Sibillo, Brunetti e Amirante

descriptions: The Paranza dei Bambini was allied with the Brunetti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: afferenti a un cartello camorristico formato dai giovani della famiglia Giuliano, in conflitto con i loro stessi parenti da molti anni, affiancati dai clan Sibillo, Brunetti e Amirante

descriptions: Brunetti was allied with Sibillo and Giuliano against Mazzarella.
edges.evidence_quote: affiancati dai clan Sibillo, Brunetti e Amirante, quest'ultimi alleati del clan Ferraiuolo-Stolder e appoggiati esternamente dal gruppo Rinaldi di San Giovanni a Teduccio

descriptions: The Muntasir Billah Brigade has ties to the Grey Wolves.
edges.evidence_quote: Some Syrian rebel groups have ties to the Grey Wolves. One is the Muntasir Billah Brigade, another is the Turkmen Abdulhamid Han Brigade.

'Ndrina Nasone.description: The 'Ndrina Nasone is a 'Ndrangheta clan based in Scilla, Calabria, Italy. Active since at least the 1970s, it has been involved in mafia association, extortion, and other crimes. The clan faced several police operations, including Alba di Scilla 3 in 2013 and Lampetra in 2021, leading to arrests. Its current status is active.

Gang of Amazons.description: A family of serial killers from Stavropol, Russia, who committed a series of murders and robberies from 2007 to 2013. Founded by Inessa Tarverdiyeva and her husband Roman Podkopaev, the group included their daughters and other relatives. They were apprehended in 2013.

Albanian Boys.description: The Albanian Boys were a gang of Albanians operating in the Bronx, New York, founded in 1991. Initially a youth ethnic street gang, they evolved into subcontractors for organized crime, engaging in extortion, intimidation, protection money, and debt collection. The gang was active through the 1990s.

descriptions: The Albanian Boys were rivals with MS-13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: MS-13

descriptions: The Albanian Boys were allied with the Rudaj Organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rudaj Organization

descriptions: The Albanian Boys are listed as rivals of the Tanglewood Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Various gangs in Westchester County and New York City, including the Albanian Boys

descriptions: Bandidos were in a conflict with Brothas Souljaz in 2013.
edges.evidence_quote: Bandidos sergeant-at-arms Peter Buch Rosenberg and another club member, Michael Fuhlendorff, were convicted of weapons possession after police discovered two loaded guns, a silencer, binoculars and other equipment at a cottage in Dronningmølle where Rosenberg was living, protected by two bodyguards, during a conflict with the Brothas Souljaz gang.

descriptions: Los Fresitas is an ally of Los Ciclones per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gulf Cartel , Los Rojos , Los Fresitas , Jalisco New Generation Cartel

'Ndrina Mannolo.description: The Mannolo are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta from Cutro and San Leonardo di Cutro, allied with the Trapasso-Zoffreo, Pane-Iazzolino, and Grande Aracri clans. They operate in the Catanzaro area, particularly Cropani and Botricello, engaging in drug trafficking, political influence, and arms use. The clan has been targeted in multiple police operations since the 1990s, with members arrested for mafia association, drug trafficking, extortion, and usury.

descriptions: Arena and Mannolo were targeted together in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Golgota" contro gli Arena, i Nicoscia e Mannolo

descriptions: Dragone is allied with Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Dragone è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro alleata con i Mannolo di San Leonardo di Cutro e gli Arena di Isola Capo Rizzuto e gli Arabia di Cutro.

descriptions: The Giglio are allied with the Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , dei Farao-Marincola di Cirò e dei Levato.

descriptions: Mannolo is listed as an allied 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Mannolo (San Leonardo di Cutro)

descriptions: Mannolo is allied with Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mannolo sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro e di San Leonardo di Cutro , alleata dei Trapasso-Zoffreo , dei Pane-Iazzolino , e dei Grande Aracri di Cutro .

descriptions: Mannolo is allied with Pane-Iazzolino.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mannolo sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro e di San Leonardo di Cutro , alleata dei Trapasso-Zoffreo , dei Pane-Iazzolino

descriptions: Mannolo and Scumaci operated together in the same areas and were arrested in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 2 agosto 2001, con l'operazione Polifemo dei Carabinieri di Sellia Marina vengono arrestati componenti della cosca Mannolo e Scumaci che operavano nelle zone di Sellia Marina e San Leonardo di Cutro .

descriptions: Mannolo is allied with Trapasso-Zoffreo.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mannolo sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro e di San Leonardo di Cutro , alleata dei Trapasso-Zoffreo

descriptions: Mannolo and Zoffreo are involved together in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 dicembre 2019 si conclude l'operazione Infectio che porta a 27 provvedimenti contro affiliati dei Trapasso, Mannolo e Zoffreo accusati a vario titolo di traffico di droga

descriptions: The text states that Pane-Iazzolino are allies of Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , con i Ferrazzo di Mesoraca e con i Farao-Marincola di Cirò .

descriptions: The Scumaci are allied with the Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e Mannolo di Cutro e con i Tropea-Talarico di Cropani .

descriptions: Trapasso is allied with Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: I Trapasso sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro e Steccato di Cutro , alleata dei Mannolo e dei Grande Aracri di Cutro .

descriptions: Kibei Boys is a sub-group of Tokyo Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: They were split into three groups/ranks, The Kibei Boys (Japanese-Americans from Japan), Issei Boys (1st generation Japanese-Americans), and the Nisei Boys (2nd generation Japanese-Americans).

descriptions: The Belforte clan joined the Nuova Camorra Speciale.
edges.evidence_quote: Nuova Camorra Speciale, alla quale aderì anche il clan Belforte

Gang de la Brise de Mer.description: Corsican criminal organization founded in the 1970s, based in Northern Corsica. Controls racketeering, slot machines, money laundering, night clubs, gambling, and casinos in Corsica, southern France, Paris, Italy, Africa, and Latin America. Known for violent robberies and conflicts with rival gangs. Estimated capital between 120 and 150 million euros.

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: The infobox lists 'Ndrangheta as an ally of Brise de Mer.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hornec family , American Mafia , Sicilian Mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Clan del Golfo , FLNC

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: The infobox lists American Mafia as an ally of Brise de Mer.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hornec family , American Mafia , Sicilian Mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Clan del Golfo , FLNC

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: Brise de Mer is suspected of killing members of Armata Corsa.
edges.evidence_quote: The "Brise de Mer" is also suspected of involvement in the 2001 murders of members of Armata Corsa , a separatist Corsican armed group.

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: The infobox lists Clan del Golfo as an ally of Brise de Mer.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hornec family , American Mafia , Sicilian Mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Clan del Golfo , FLNC

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: The Brise de mer gang and Colonna family were involved in an internal conflict in 2007.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2007, an internal conflict led to the deaths of 102 people on the island of Corsica fracturing the influence of the two larger groups in the island ( Brise de mer gang and Colonna family).

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: The infobox lists FLNC as an ally of Brise de Mer.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hornec family , American Mafia , Sicilian Mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Clan del Golfo , FLNC

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: The infobox lists Hornec family as an ally of Brise de Mer.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hornec family , American Mafia , Sicilian Mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Clan del Golfo , FLNC

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Petit Bar Gang , Venzolasca Gang , Armata Corsa

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: The infobox lists Sicilian Mafia as an ally of Brise de Mer.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hornec family , American Mafia , Sicilian Mafia , 'Ndrangheta , Clan del Golfo , FLNC

descriptions: Venzolasca Gang took over territory from the Brise de Mer Gang in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2010, The "Venzolasca Gang" penetrated large amounts of territory previously occupied by the Brise de Mer Gang.

edges.source: Gang de la Brise de Mer
descriptions: The Venzolasca Gang is considered the successor of the Brise de Mer gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Known groups in the Corsican mafia are the Venzolasca Gang ... considered the Brise de Mer successors.

descriptions: Los Del Sur is listed as an enemy of Mara Salvatrucha in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Mara Barrio 18 , Nayib Bukele , Gobierno salvadoreño , Pandilla Mao Mao , Gobierno federal de los Estados Unidos , Cártel de Juárez , Los Negros , Sombra Negra , Cártel de Tijuana , Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva , Bloods , Norteños , Armenian Power , Latin Kings y Los Del Sur

descriptions: The PKK cooperated with TİKB as part of the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2016, the PKK helped to launch the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement with nine other Kurdish and Turkish revolutionary leftist, socialist and communist groups (including the TKP/ML , THKP-C/MLSPB , MKP , TKEP/L , TİKB , DKP , DK and MLKP ) with the aim of overthrowing the Turkish government of Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

descriptions: The Resistance Front is listed as a group that is part of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: The Resistance Front, Virginia jihad network, Jamaat-ud-Dawa, Milli Muslim League, Jamaat al-Dawah ila al-Quran wal-Sunnah (negated), Tehreek-e-Azaadi Jammu and Kashmir

descriptions: The Resistance Front is a proxy outfit of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: The success of the operation is seen as a significant setback to Lashkar-e-Taiba, coming shortly after the United Nations banned The Resistance Front (TRF), a proxy outfit of LeT.

descriptions: TRF is a proxy organization associated with LeT.
edges.evidence_quote: The Resistance Front (TRF) is believed to be a proxy organization associated with the Lashkar-e-Taiba.

descriptions: Rasta City and Sixx/6ixx/6 are currently enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: Their current enemies also include 6

descriptions: Sixx/6ixx/6 split from Rasta City.
edges.evidence_quote: after a falling out between some Rasta City members, a split occurred, leading to the formation of Sixx/6ixx/6 and Seven, the latter of which is now called Rasta City

descriptions: Rasta City agreed to a peace deal with Sixx.
edges.evidence_quote: In November 2023 it was reported in the news that Rasta City had agreed to a peace deal with Sixx.

Dirty Dozen Motorcycle Club.description: The Dirty Dozen Motorcycle Club was an outlaw motorcycle club based in Arizona, founded in 1964 by twelve founding members. It became the largest and most violent motorcycle gang in the state, involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, prostitution, assault, and murder. The club merged with the Hells Angels in 1997.

descriptions: Dirty Dozen clashed with Bad Company MC over territory in 1980.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dirty Dozen came into conflict the following year with the Bad Company MC, a club from New Mexico who were attempting to form a chapter in nearby Globe, resulting in two local Bad Company members, David Howell and Laird Kriley, being badly beaten and ordered to disband.

descriptions: Dirty Dozen allied with Hells Angels for methamphetamine supply.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dirty Dozen, in turn, formed an alliance with the Hells Angels, who became the club's main supplier of methamphetamine.

descriptions: Dirty Dozen merged into Hells Angels in 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: The merger between the Dirty Dozen and the Hells Angels was consecrated during a meeting of members from both clubs at the Oakland chapter clubhouse in October 1997.

descriptions: Dirty Dozen and Mongols fought over prostitution rackets in Tucson starting in 1982.
edges.evidence_quote: A war broke out over control of prostitution rackets in Tucson between the local Dirty Dozen chapter and the Mongols chapter in the city, which was formed in May 1982.

descriptions: Dirty Dozen and Seekers MC were involved in a violent feud in 1976.
edges.evidence_quote: A series of shootings and fights broke out between members of the Dirty Dozen and the rival Seekers MC after two Seekers bikers were wounded by shots fired by unknown assailants on Interstate 10 north of Tucson on February 26, 1976.

descriptions: Dirty Dozen fought Vagos over expansion into Arizona in 1990.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1990, the Dirty Dozen became involved in a conflict with the Vagos after the California-based club expanded into Arizona, establishing a chapter in Phoenix.

descriptions: Infobox lists Dirty Dozen MC as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dirty Dozen MC

descriptions: Dirty Dozen MC is a support club for the Loners Motorcycle Club in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: Police had also temporarily confiscated the 'cuts' of Loners MC Nomads chapter belonging to the individual that was arrested and a Dirty Dozen MC 'cut', which is one of the Loners support clubs in Canada.

descriptions: Mongols warred with Dirty Dozen in Tucson in 1982.
edges.evidence_quote: The club founded a chapter in Tucson in May 1982, which led to a war with an existing chapter of the Dirty Dozen over control of prostitution rackets in the area.

descriptions: The Savage Nomads engaged in running battles with the Dirty Dozen.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was involved in a number of running battles with rival gangs Seven Immortals, Savage Skulls , and the Dirty Dozen.

descriptions: Savage Skulls had running battles with Dirty Dozen.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang ... was also involved in a number of running battles with rival gangs, including the Seven Immortals, Savage Nomads, and Dirty Dozen.

descriptions: Bin Laden Records is a local gang that was part of La ONU.
edges.evidence_quote: La ONU was divided into local gangs such as Bin Laden Records, los Extranjeros, los Anormales, among others.

descriptions: Los Ninis prevailed over Los Dámasos in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: With him at the helm, they prevailed over " Los Dámasos "

descriptions: Los Dámasos is an armed wing of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: international alliances are thought to include ... Los Dámasos (armed wing)

descriptions: Masseria fought against Maranzano's Castellammarese gang.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1930, the Castellammarese War started between Masseria and Salvatore Maranzano, the new leader of Cola Schirò's Castellammarese gang.

descriptions: Black Jackets and Holmblaaa are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rock Machine , Veles gang , Black Dogs , Bandogs , 210 International , Dogpack 416 , Black Army , Holmblaaa , Kommando 210

descriptions: Haji Mastan worked in association with Karim Lala.
edges.evidence_quote: He worked in association with Karim Lala and by the 1960s became a rich man.

descriptions: Varadarajan Mudaliar acted in tandem with Haji Mastan to steal dock cargo.
edges.evidence_quote: Mudaliar, in tandem with Haji Mastan, ventured into stealing dock cargo.

descriptions: The Mancuso opposed the Pardea family by supporting the Fiarè.
edges.evidence_quote: supportarono la 'ndrina dei Fiarè di San Gregorio d'Ippona durante la faida contro la famiglia Pardea

descriptions: UWSA has close links with Ta'ang Army.
edges.evidence_quote: the UWSA maintains close links with FPNCC partners like ... the Ta'ang Army

descriptions: The Semion Mogilevich organization's business is often connected with the Solntsevskaya Bratva.
edges.evidence_quote: Its business is often connected with that of the Solntsevskaya Bratva and the Vyacheslav Ivankov Organization.

descriptions: The Semion Mogilevich organization's business is often connected with the Vyacheslav Ivankov Organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Its business is often connected with that of the Solntsevskaya Bratva and the Vyacheslav Ivankov Organization.
